# Ozigi

> Ozigi is the AI tool that makes your content sound human — not like ChatGPT wrote it. It transforms raw notes, URLs, and PDFs into platform-ready social posts for X, LinkedIn, Discord, Slack, and email that sound like a real person with a specific voice, not a language model running on average.

## Core URLs

- Homepage: https://ozigi.app
- Documentation: https://ozigi.app/docs
- Pricing: https://ozigi.app/pricing
- Demo: https://ozigi.app/demo
- Blog: https://blog.ozigi.app

## Platform Deep Dives

- Multimodal Ingestion Pipeline: https://ozigi.app/docs/multimodal-pipeline
- The Banned Lexicon (Curing AI-Speak): https://ozigi.app/docs/the-banned-lexicon
- System Personas (Editorial Briefs): https://ozigi.app/docs/system-personas
- Human-in-the-Loop Architecture: https://ozigi.app/docs/human-in-the-loop

## Key Features

- Context Engine: Extracts narrative from unstructured data (notes, PDFs, URLs, images, audio, video)
- Banned Lexicon: API-level token restrictions that eliminate AI-speak and corporate buzzwords
- System Personas: Database-backed voice profiles that define editorial identity, not just instructions
- Human-in-the-Loop: 90/10 rule — engine does the extraction and drafting, you add specificity and context
- Multi-Platform Publishing: Native integrations for X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Discord, Slack, and email
- Native Image Generation: Platform-aware graphics powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash

## Technical Stack

- Built on Google Gemini 2.5 Flash for large context windows and multimodal capabilities
- Next.js frontend with Supabase backend
- OAuth integrations for X and LinkedIn
- Webhook support for Discord and Slack

## Target Audience

- Developers and technical founders who want their content to sound like them, not like AI
- DevRel professionals who need consistent, authentic community content at volume
- Founders and leaders building a personal brand without sacrificing their voice
- Content creators, marketers, and educators who are done fixing ChatGPT output before it can be published

## Contact

- Creator: @DumebiTheWriter on X/Twitter
